SEARCH
Package com.example.myapplication

Class EventDatabaseTest

java.lang.Object
com.example.myapplication.EventDatabaseTest
public class EventDatabaseTest extends Object
Integration tests for EventDatabase that write real data to Firestore and clean up after. These tests require a real device or emulator with internet access. Place in: app/src/androidTest/java/com/example/myapplication/ The following test file was written with the guidance of Claude AI Prompt: "Guide me with writing tests for EventStore" March 13, 2026 Extended with coverage for getEventsByOrganizer, qrValue, privateEvent, and edge cases.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    EventDatabaseTest()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    setUp()
     
    void
    tearDown()
    Cleans up every event written during the test from Firestore.
    void
    testAddEvent_geolocationRequired_true()
    addEvent should save geolocationRequired = true correctly.
    void
    testAddEvent_privateEvent_false()
    addEvent should save privateEvent = false correctly.
    void
    testAddEvent_privateEvent_true()
    addEvent should save privateEvent = true correctly.
    void
    testAddEvent_qrValueMatchesEventId()
    addEvent should auto-set qrValue equal to the generated document ID.
    void
    testAddEvent_savesToFirestore()
    addEvent should save core fields to Firestore correctly.
    void
    testDelEventById_nonExistentId_doesNothing()
    delEventById with a non-existent ID should not throw or cause errors.
    void
    testDelEventById_removesFromFirestore()
    delEventById should remove the event document from Firestore.
    void
    testGetEventById_nonExistentId_documentedBug()
    Documents the known bug: getEventById throws IndexOutOfBoundsException when no matching event exists because getDocuments().get(0) is called on an empty list without a null/empty check.
    void
    testGetEventById_returnsCorrectEvent()
    getEventById should retrieve the correct event and map all fields properly.
    void
    testGetEventsByOrganizer_doesNotReturnOtherOrganizersEvents()
    getEventsByOrganizer should not return events belonging to a different organizer.
    void
    testGetEventsByOrganizer_noEvents_returnsEmptyList()
    getEventsByOrganizer should return an empty list for a deviceId with no events.
    void
    testGetEventsByOrganizer_returnsMatchingEvents()
    getEventsByOrganizer should return all events matching the given deviceId.

      Cleans up every event written during the test from Firestore.

      Throws:
      InterruptedException

      public void testAddEvent_geolocationRequired_true() throws InterruptedException

      InterruptedException

    • testDelEventById_removesFromFirestore

      public void testDelEventById_removesFromFirestore() throws InterruptedException
      delEventById should remove the event document from Firestore.
      Throws:
      InterruptedException

    • testDelEventById_nonExistentId_doesNothing

      public void testDelEventById_nonExistentId_doesNothing() throws InterruptedException
      delEventById with a non-existent ID should not throw or cause errors. It should silently do nothing.
      Throws:
      InterruptedException

    • testGetEventById_returnsCorrectEvent

      public void testGetEventById_returnsCorrectEvent() throws InterruptedException
      getEventById should retrieve the correct event and map all fields properly.
      Throws:
      InterruptedException

    • testGetEventById_nonExistentId_documentedBug

      public void testGetEventById_nonExistentId_documentedBug() throws InterruptedException
      Documents the known bug: getEventById throws IndexOutOfBoundsException when no matching event exists because getDocuments().get(0) is called on an empty list without a null/empty check. This test is expected to fail (or hang without calling the listener) until the bug is fixed. It serves as a regression marker. Fix needed in EventDatabase.getEventById: if (queryDocumentSnapshots.isEmpty()) { return; }
      Throws:
      InterruptedException

    • testGetEventsByOrganizer_returnsMatchingEvents

      public void testGetEventsByOrganizer_returnsMatchingEvents() throws InterruptedException
      getEventsByOrganizer should return all events matching the given deviceId.
      Throws:
      InterruptedException

    • testGetEventsByOrganizer_noEvents_returnsEmptyList

      public void testGetEventsByOrganizer_noEvents_returnsEmptyList() throws InterruptedException
      getEventsByOrganizer should return an empty list for a deviceId with no events.
      Throws:
      InterruptedException

    • testGetEventsByOrganizer_doesNotReturnOtherOrganizersEvents

      public void testGetEventsByOrganizer_doesNotReturnOtherOrganizersEvents() throws InterruptedException
      getEventsByOrganizer should not return events belonging to a different organizer.
      Throws:
      InterruptedException
